query:
SELECT 
  debt_range,
  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_amount
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
GROUP BY debt_range
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 20;

  COUNT(*) as row_count,
  SUM(total_amount) as total_amount
FROM debt_collected_cache
